pom.xml.general_idea: Enforce a minimum JDK version of 24 for the build environment using the maven-enforcer-plugin.
Configure the build to produce a Multi-Release JAR with specific source roots for Java 9, 16, 17, and 21.
Replace javax.persistence dependencies with jakarta.persistence-api to support modern Java EE/Jakarta EE standards.
Replace javax.validation dependencies with jakarta.validation-api to support modern Java EE/Jakarta EE standards.
Upgrade Hibernate Validator to version 8.x which requires Jakarta Validation and is incompatible with older Java versions.
